text:
Created attachment 144158
patch generated with git-diff

Update net-mgmt/netmagis-* ports to support staging.
While we are here, clean-up these ports.
Portlint is happy with these ports.
I didn't modify PORTREVISION since there is no need to portupdate/portupgrade.

I tried to add LICENSE information, but portlint does not like me.
